tossups.question: In two similar stories by this author, a character flows with the lava from Vesuvius’s eruption to look for a character who later pulls back a curtain to let noise into a theater. In a story by this author, a pastor is frightened to spot a giant figure in a garage - that figure had earlier been spotted wrapped around a boat’s mast after getting through the atmosphere. In a story by this author, the narrator shoots the man ahead of him in a traffic jam before an assassin behind him can kill him. In a story by this author of “The Stone Sky” and (*) “The Other Eurydice”, a man shoots his wife’s lover after erasing all information about his wife from the title system. The title story of one collection by this author centers on a hunter waiting to see if his arrow will hit a pouncing lion, while many tales in another of his collections open with scientific epigraphs. For 10 points, name this Italian author who collected many of his stories in t-zero and Cosmicomics.
